narrative:
Jackson (precinct in Union County) has 638 registered voters, with 49.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 42.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 33.5 percentage points.
